titleStmt.title: SII 16.208: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 208. (A.R. No. 477 of 1915.) SANTARĀVŪRU, BAPATLA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up outside the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1477, Rākshasa, Māgha śu. 15, corresponding to 1556 A.D., January 26, (Sunday).

It registers a gift of the income derived from paṇṭa-suṅkam collected in the nāyaṅkara village of Santarāvūru to the local deities Chennarāya and Rāmayaliṅga by Mahā-maṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju-china-Śrīraṅgarāju-Jaggarājayyadēva-mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1477 Agunē
ṁṭi rākṣasa saṁvatsara māgha śu 15
lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadē
vamahārāyalu ratnasiṁhvā
sanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛthvīsāṁmrā
jyamu śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu catu
rbhuvanādhīśulaina saṁtarāpūri śrīca
nnarāyani divya śrīpādapadmaṁbulaku
daṁḍaṁ samarpiṁcinni rāmayaliṁ
gamunaku daṁḍaṁ samarpiṁccinni śrīma
nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju cina śrī
raṁggarāju jaggarājayya dēvamahā
rājuluṁgāri samarppaṇa kramamu
mā nāyakarānakuṁ jellivacci saṁ
ttarāvūri grāmānanu baṁṭasuṁkaṁ
valla Ādāyapaḍḍa rokhaṁ saḥ(ha) kaligi
naṁtavaṭṭu mī Aṁggaraṁggavai bhavāla
kuṁnnu Amṛtapaḷlakunnu samarppiṁ
stimi ganakaAvadhariṁccunadi . maṁgga
ḷamahāśrīśrīśrīṁjēyunū . śrī
svadattā dviguṇaṁpuṇyaṁ paradattānupā
lanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattā ni
ṣphalaṁ bhavēt . Ekaika bhaginīlōkē sarvē
ṣāmēva bhūbhṛtāṁ . na bhōgyā na kara
grāhyā vipradattā vasuṁdharā .
Digital edition of SII 16.208 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
